nodes.body: Could you please add the jira ticket to all the new TODO comments? otherwise it's easy to lose track of them.
Do we need the tooBigAlert function? What is the difference between this and `renderTooBigAlert`
renderTooBigAlert has a message meant to be inside an iframe so there's added html. tooBigAlert is just the error message and nothing else
minor, it should probably be good to return an empty render or a spinner until the data is fully loaded.
Can be simplified to: import React from 'react';
